description: In June 2021, President Nayib Bukele announced that El Salvador would adopt Bitcoin as legal tender. The initiative faced intense domestic skepticism and international criticism from the IMF, despite being passed by the Legislative Assembly.

key_events.description: President Bukele announces Bitcoin Law at Bitcoin 2021 conference.
IMF officially warns El Salvador against using crypto as legal tender.
Technical glitches during the Chivo wallet launch spark public frustration.
Bitcoin price volatility causes concerns about national reserves stability.

calibration_notes: Useful for measuring how sovereign adoption of speculative assets impacts public trust and economic sentiment.
